Bash(
cd /tmp/grscorp-fix

echo "=== CHECKING ALL BLOG FILENAMES ==="

Bash(
cd /tmp/grscorp-fix

echo "=== EXTRACTING BLOG SLUGS FROM blog.html ==="
grep -o "'[a-z0-9-]*'" blog.html | grep -v "^\\'\\'" | sort -u | wc -l
echo "slugs in blog.html array"

echo ""
echo "=== EXTRACTING ACTUAL FILENAMES ==="
ls posts/*.html | sed 's/posts\\///' | sed 's/\\.html$//' | sort -u | wc -l
echo "actual blog files \(without .html\)"

echo ""
echo "=== CHECKING FOR MISMATCHES ==="
echo "Slugs in blog.html that don't have .html files:"

# Get all slugs from blog.html
grep -o "'[a-z0-9-]*'" blog.html | tr -d "'" | sort -u > /tmp/slugs_in_html.txt

# Get all filenames
ls posts/*.html | sed 's/posts\\///' | sed 's/\\.html$//' | sort -u > /tmp/actual_files.txt

# Find missing files
comm -23 /tmp/slugs_in_html.txt /tmp/actual_files.txt | head -20
)
